global.dotbody: This is Peter-Power-MD, a powerful WhatsApp bot.
global.pmallow:
*Hi, this is Peter-Power Bot Info*
You have been blocked for spamming.

 _Powered by Mrskymax | Peter-Power-MD_
global.pmwarn: ✋Hey! Please don't spam or you may be blocked. _You have ${checkPermit.times} warning(s)._
global.permited:
*Hey there!*

You've been permitted by my owner to message freely.

 _Powered by Mrskymax | Peter-Power-MD_
global.revoked:
*Hey!*

Your messaging permissions have been revoked.

 _Powered by Mrskymax | Peter-Power-MD_
global.antlink:
Link Detected!
*You’ve violated the group rules.*
global.session:
*This is your session.json. Keep it safe!*
_Now upload this JSON file in your forked repo._
Then deploy on Glitch or another platform to keep the bot alive.

*Powered by Peter-Power-MD*

global.chat_desc: *Available Options:* mute, unmute, archive, unarchive, read, unread, delete
global.dot:
Hey there, did you mean *-help?*
Don't disturb unless it's important 😉

global.owner: 👑 Command reserved for the bot owner.
